feature: MDS/PFS/AVS signal precision improvements from MiroFish validation
evidence: Validated via 13 targeted tests in tests/test_mirofish_signal_improvements.py: 5 tests for V2 method-function AST normalization (self.attr -> Name), 3 tests for V3 PFS spread factor (repetition boost), 5 tests for V4 scripts/commands/cli layer recognition. Full regression suite: 1100 passed, 0 failed.

V2_method_function_normalization.impact: self.attr collapsed to Name in AST n-grams, improving MDS detection of method-function mutant pairs
V2_method_function_normalization.similarity_improvement: method vs function pairs now score >=0.75-0.80 instead of lower values

V3_pfs_spread_factor.impact: Non-canonical instance count >2 now boosts fragmentation score via spread_factor

V4_scripts_layer_recognition.impact: scripts/, commands/, cli/ now classified as layer 0 entry points
